1861510.name: Fantasy Grounds - Pathfinder RPG - GameMastery Map Pack: Temples
1861510.description:
Note:
This product is not eligible for a PDF discount from Paizo

GameMastery Map Pack: Temples

GameMastery Map Pack: Temples contains 18 full-color 5 x 8 map tiles, stunningly crafted by cartographer Corey Macourek, that unite to form a completely customizable temple adventuring area.
Locations include:
  • Healing Temple
  • Druidic Mountaintop
  • Cultist Warehouse
  • Sacrifice Temple
  • Spider God Cavern
For use with the industry's most popular roleplaying or tabletop miniature campaigns, and useable by experienced GMs and novices alike, this product fits perfectly into any Game Master's arsenal.

Good GMs can never have too many maps at their disposal, and Paizo's GameMastery Map Packs provide high-quality gridded maps for use with both RPGs and miniatures games.
While this product has been developed to be used for pathfinder 1, it is compatible with pathfinder 2.0, 5E and any other ruleset supported by Fantasy Grounds.
This product is not a PDF or accessible outside of Fantasy Grounds. It has been lovingly converted for use within Fantasy Grounds and features the following additions:
  • All maps resized and set up with a preset grid to make combats easy to manage
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Wayne Arsenault
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and any ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
